data.title: Elder Clark G. Gilbert appointed to Quorum of the Twelve Apostles, ordained on Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: On February 11, 2026, Elder Clark G. Gilbert was appointed as the latest member of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. His ordination took place on February 12. President Dallin H. presided over the ordination ceremony.
Gold prices rise almost 1%, reaching $4,967.37/oz.
China’s central bank sets the yuan mid-point at 6.9398 per dollar, higher than the prior close of 6.9033.
China’s central bank sets the yuan mid-point at a peak not seen since May 11, 2023.
The Taiwan overnight interbank rate rises to 0.808% from 0.806% at the previous session open.

data.title: Kyndryl to upgrade Yamaguchi FG's core banking system into a multi-bank platform, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: In Tokyo on February 12, 2026, Kyndryl, listed on the NYSE as KD, a top provider of critical enterprise technology services, revealed plans to assist Yamaguchi Financial Group (Yamaguchi FG) in constructing a unified platform for its central banking system. This initiative aims to enhance the technological capabilities of Yamaguchi FG by integrating various systems, leading to...

The improving U.S. fiscal situation and robust economic growth are bolstering the dollar’s reserve currency position, Miran says.
Early gains in S&P 500 E-minis reversed, leaving the index down 0.1%; Nasdaq futures declined 0.2%.

data.title: GreenPower Motor Company reports $8.5M revenue and $4.2M net income for Q3. Leading electric vehicle manufacturer.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 12, 2026, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (Nasdaq: GP) announced its position as a prominent producer and supplier of all-electric, custom-made, zero-emission vehicles for medium and heavy-duty use in cargo and delivery sectors, as well as shuttle services.

SoftBank Group Corp - A public offering of shares in Japan is planned as part of the proposed IPO
SoftBank Group Corp - PayPay will remain a subsidiary of SoftBank following the completion of the public listing
SoftBank Group Corp - The exact timing, number of shares, and pricing for the proposed offering have not yet been finalized

data.title: Align Partners proposes shareholder proposals to Gabia for strengthening governance practices at upcoming 27th AGM.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, Align Partners Capital Management Inc. has submitted formal shareholder proposals for the 27th Annual General Meeting of Gabia, Inc. They are calling for improved governance practices to tackle the Company's consistent undervaluation. With the upcoming AGM, Align Partners emphasizes the importance of addressing this issue.
The Nikkei share average slipped 1.2%.
There has been no substantial impact of tariffs on inflation, Miran reports.
The natural rate of unemployment is expected to be about 4%, Miran says.
